ocr_mistral.text:
USSR

ILLUSTRATED MONTHLY
1706 Eighteenth Street, N.W.
Washington 9, D. C.
ADams 2-3426

The magazine USSR is published by reciprocal agreement between the governments of the United States and the Soviet Union. The agreement provides for the publication and circulation of the magazine USSR in the United States and the magazine Amerika in the Soviet Union.

Page
Happy New Year
By Anatoli Sofronov 1
Sputnik II: Cosmic Fact-Finder 4
Earth Satellite:
Link in Over-all Scientific and Technological Development
by Alexander Topchiev 10
Learning More About Our Planet
by Mikhail Molodensky 10
The World's Weather
by Alexander Obukhov 11
The Earth's Magnetic Field
by S. Dolginov and N. Pushkov 12
Observatories in Space
by Victor Ambartosmyan 13
Trailing Cosmic Rays
by Sergei Vernov 14
World's Hams Tracked Sputniks
by Andrei Ivanov 15
Loving Care for Children
by Olga Sokolova-Ponomareva 16
People Are Wonderful
by Ilya Kotenko 20
The Schoolteacher
by Lydia Cherpakova 22
The Next Fifty Years of Medicine
by Alexander Bakalev 28
Soviet Cartoon Films
by Nikolai Abramov 30
Winter Holiday 34
Flying Soviet Air Lanes
by Pavel Zhigarev 38
Flourishing Lithuania
by Justas Paleckis 46
Social Center
in a Siberian Steel City
by Yuri Grafsky 52
Intercontinental Pipeline
by Andrei Ionov 58
Askania-Nova Preserve
by Mikhail Alexandrov 61
The World's Fastest Woman Skater
by Victor Kuprianov 64

Anything in this issue may be reprinted or reproduced with due acknowledgement to the magazine USSR.

Subscription Rate:
6 Months ... $1.00
1 Year ... 1.80
2 Years ... 3.00

Published by the Embassy of the Union of Soviet Socialist Republics in the USA.
Second Class read privileges authorized at Washington, D.C., with additional entries at Milwaukee, Wis., and Chicago, Ill.
Printed by The Canso Press, Inc.
